rationale: Educ. Code §21.351 governs the recommended teacher appraisal process and performance criteria. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The commissioner shall adopt a recommended appraisal process and criteria on which to appraise the performance of teachers.
_note: Rule text concerns teacher performance appraisal only; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
